string.text: The commander gave me a mission: finding a needle in a haystack.\n I should ask Colonel Kuznetsov about the mission in more detail.
Hidden Threat: Sole Survivor

I barely got any more useful information from Kuznetsov about my assignment. The colonel instructed me to check up on the survivor of the Darkscape Sawmill attack. He's staying at the Farm in Cordon. I will have to use a disguise to talk to him.
Hidden Threat: Return to Colonel Kuznetsov
Something went wrong and the survivor is dead. Tell Kuznetsov of this failure.
Hidden Threat: Get to the Sawmill in Darkscape
I want to look around the Sawmill myself, to find any clues that might shed some light on what happened here.
Hidden Threat: Examine the Sawmill building
I want to look around the Sawmill myself, to find any clues that might shed some light on what happened here.
Hidden Threat: Return to Colonel Kuznetsov
I didn't find much here. It's time to return to the commander with a report.
Hidden Threat: Disable the Brain Scorcher
The "Brain Scorcher" is seriously hampering military operations in the north. Kuznetsov has ordered me to deal with it. The scientists in Yantar might know how to do it. I need to talk to Sakharov.
Hidden Threat: Return to Colonel Kuznetsov
The Brain Scorcher is disabled. I just need to report to the colonel.
Hidden Threat: Get to the Jupiter plant
We received an SOS signal from the squad that Degtyarev sent on a secret mission. They reported that they were attacked on the near the plant in Jupiter by unknown forces, and urgently need support.
Hidden Threat: Inspect the production facilities at the "Jupiter" plant
The entrance of the plant is empty, and so are the administrative offices. I need to go deeper into the production facilities.

Degtyarev's squad could not be saved. Only he knows what their mission was. The unknown attackers gave me a warm welcome. They were looking for something at the plant. Hmm... I don't recognize the insignia on their patch. I should bring one back for the colonel.
Hidden Threat: Talk to Colonel Kuznetsov
The unknown stalkers were all wearing the same patch. Perhaps the colonel knows more about them.
Hidden Threat: Talk to Lieutenant Kirillov
Lieutenant Kirillov asked me to stop by and see him.
Hidden Threat: Take the military radio to the Dark Valley
I can handle a little light delivery. The guards at the entrance to X-18 are waiting for a new radio, which I should deliver.
Hidden Threat: Repel the ISG attack
Oh, man! Perfect timing. I need to organize the defenses.
Hidden Threat: Examine the attackers
I'm alive and well, that's good. We need to examine the attackers for useful information.
Hidden Threat: Talk to Lieutenant Kirillov
I found a PDA on one of the ISG mercenaries, possibly the commander of the group. It's locked, but our technician should be able to handle it.
Hidden Threat: Wait for Kirillov to unlock the PDA
Kirillov said that it will take him about a day to unlock the PDA.
The tech said he's finished hacking the PDA we found.

The maps we retrieved from the PDA marked locations where I've run into ISG before. Jupiter Plant, the plant over X-18. This must mean that the other markers are also ISG targets. I need to report this to Kuznetsov immediately.
Hidden Threat: Meet Sergeant Gorobetz
The sergeant spotted the ISG group and asked for help. We are meeting at the Hospital in the outskirts of Pripyat.
Hidden Threat: The Mouse in the Mousetrap
Assault the ISG headquarters.
Hidden Threat: Kill the ISG Sniper

The ISG plans to eliminate Colonel Degtyarev. He doesn't stand a chance. The ISG task force has already been dispatched a long time ago, and I probably won't have time to warn the colonel. But I can take a risk and kill the sniper, to ruin the ISG ambush.
Hidden Threat: Support the SSU detachment
The sniper is eliminated. I need to help Degtyarev's SSU detachment fight back against the ISG.
Degtyarev is waiting for me with the case at the military base in Agroprom.
I received an order from the colonel, to return to the base and talk to him.
Hidden Threat: Plant a recorder in the Dead City
I need to go to Dead City, and set a recorder in the standalone house in the south-west of the area.
Hidden Threat: Wait 2 days
The recorder is in place. Wait two days to pick it up.
Hidden Threat: Pick up the recorder from Dead City
2 days have passed, I need to pick up the recorder and take it to Colonel Degtyarev.
Hidden Threat: Return to Degtyarev
I have the recorder, time to take it to Colonel Degtyarev.
Hidden Threat: Talk to the squad leader at CNPP

The ISG are planning to break through the Monolith at CNPP. They're most likely already there, and my job is to keep them out of the Sarcophagus. My support squad is waiting for me at the arranged location.
Hidden Threat: Go to the northwest of CNPP

At the main entrance, we only found regular mercenaries, not ISG. The military squad leader reported that one of his scouts lost contact. He may have been detected and killed. Since the main entrance is not our primary target, I should check the road from the Hospital.
Hidden Threat: Eliminate the ISG team
It's just as I suspected. The mercenaries were distracting the main Monolith forces, and the ISG were waiting to slip in through the hospital. Time for combat!
Hidden Threat: Report your success to Degtyarev
The mission was completed, the ISG group was destroyed, and now I have to report to the colonel.
Hidden Threat: Report to Colonel Kuznetsov
In the absence of Degtyarev, I now once again obey Kuznetsov, who has yet another task for me.
Major Vereshchagin is the same SSU agent who saved my life in Pripyat, I recognized him immediately. What would bring him here?
Hidden Threat: Go to the entrance to the Pripyat Underground
It's time to finish off the ISG. My assault squad is waiting for me at the entrance to the Pripyat Underground, on the Jupiter side.
Hidden Threat: Enter the Pripyat Underground
It's about time we were done with ISG.
Hidden Threat: Eliminate all enemies in the Pripyat Underground
It's about time we put an end to ISG.
Hidden Threat: Report your success to Major Vereshchagin
ISG is finished. The assault was a success. It's time to report to Major Vereshchagin.
[HT] Southern Checkpoint: Hand over the documents
Give the accounting reports to Major Zhurov, at the Southern roadblock in Cordon.
[HT] Agroprom: Find Sgt. Lozhkin's courier
Sergeant Lozhkin's lost courier is somewhere on the road, between our base and Garbage. He's more interested in the courier's package, which I should bring back to him.
[HT] Agroprom: Return the package to Lozhkin
I found Sergeant Lozhkin's lost package, which I should bring back to him.
%s, your presence is required at the base. There is an urgent assignment waiting for you.

Stalker, our case is still at a dead end. But we have an assignment for you. Our northern operations are severely hampered by the Brain Scorcher. Talk to Sakharov in Yantar and find a way to disable it.
Stalker, come see me, I need to talk to you.
%s, come in, we need to talk.
%s, about your PDA. Come on over, we have things to discuss.
Hey %s, long time no see. I spotted a group of ISG. I can't do this alone, I need help. If you have the guts to go to the hospital in the outskirts of Pripyat, you might earn some new stripes.
Stalker %s, return to base and come straight to me.
Stalker %s, report to me immediately!
%s asked for you. You've got a free pass to our bases for 2 hours. Don't do anything stupid, if you want to live. Our boys, they don't like the military very much.
